definitions.macd: EMA(12) - EMA(26), signal EMA(9), histogram MACD minus signal.
definitions.relative_strength: Ticker momentum percentage minus benchmark momentum percentage over the same lookback.
definitions.td9: TD Sequential setup count only: close greater/less than close four bars earlier, capped at 9.
definitions.timeframes: daily, weekly, and monthly bars; momentum keys use d/w/m suffixes.
